Home.title: Full-stack SaaS hosting automation platform
Home.description: Hostinvo is a complete multi-tenant SaaS platform covering client management, product catalog, orders, billing with Stripe and PayPal, cPanel and Plesk live provisioning, domain lifecycle management, a support ticketing system, and a self-service client portal — all with English and Arabic RTL support.
Home.backendDescription: Ten feature modules are live: authentication with role-based access control, tenant-scoped client and catalog management, order checkout, invoice billing with Stripe and PayPal gateway webhooks, encrypted gateway settings, cPanel and Plesk live provisioning drivers with queue retry handling, domain lifecycle and registrar logs, support ticketing with department routing, and a notification template engine with per-locale records.
Home.frontendDescription: Protected admin and portal workspaces cover all ten modules with full English and Arabic translations, RTL-aware layouts using next-intl, locale-switched routing, and a self-service client portal for invoices, tickets, domains, and provisioning visibility.
Home.servicesDescription: Phase 14 completes the full platform foundation. All core modules are live and deployed. Future phases will add automated registrar integrations, subscription auto-renewal, and advanced reporting.
Home.deliverable1: Live cPanel and Plesk provisioning drivers with queue-based retry, sanitized logs, and real-time status sync
Home.deliverable2: Domain lifecycle management with contacts, renewal history, and registrar activity logs
Home.deliverable3: Support ticketing with departments, priorities, reply threads, internal notes, and portal access
Home.deliverable4: Self-service client portal for invoices, tickets, domains, and provisioning
Home.deliverable5: Complete English and Arabic localization with RTL layout, per-locale notification templates, and locale-aware formatting

Auth.loginDescription: Authenticate with your Hostinvo account to access your tenant workspace.
Auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and Hostinvo will send a password reset link.
Auth.resetPasswordDescription: Set a new password for your Hostinvo account.
Auth.resetPasswordPlaceholder: This page is ready for the password reset flow and uses the backend reset endpoint when a token is present.
Auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.
Auth.forgotPasswordError: Unable to send the reset link.
Auth.tokenMissing: The reset token is missing. Open the link from your email to continue.
Auth.dashboardDescription: This placeholder confirms that the tenant-aware auth foundation is working before later modules are added.
Auth.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach the authentication service.
Auth.verifyEmailDescription: Check your inbox for a verification link from Hostinvo.
Auth.verifyEmailPendingBody: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click the link to activate your account.
Auth.verifyEmailSuccessBody: Your email address has been confirmed. You can now sign in.
Auth.verifyEmailAlreadyBody: This email address was already verified. You can sign in now.
Auth.verifyEmailInvalidBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one below.
Auth.resendVerificationSuccess: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
Auth.resendVerificationError: Unable to resend the verification email.
Auth.verificationEmailRequired: Please verify your email before signing in.
Auth.mfaDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue.
Auth.mfaSetupDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
Auth.mfaSetupStep1: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
Auth.mfaSetupStep2: Scan the QR code or enter the setup key manually
Auth.mfaSetupStep3: Enter the 6-digit code shown in the app
Auth.mfaSetupConfirmError: Code verification failed. Please try again.
Auth.mfaRecoveryCodesBody: Store these codes in a safe place. Each can be used once to sign in if you lose your authenticator.
Auth.mfaSessionExpired: Authentication session expired. Please sign in again.
Auth.turnstileError: Security verification failed. Please try again.
Auth.passkeyNotSupported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser.
Auth.passkeyAccountSetupRequired: No matching passkey is available for this account. Sign in with your password, then add or manage passkeys from Settings > Security where available.

Dashboard.overviewDescription: Review the current tenant context, assigned roles, and the available client, catalog, order, billing, and provisioning entry points before later business modules are added.
Dashboard.clientsSummaryDescription: Active customer records in the current tenant workspace.
Dashboard.servicesSummaryDescription: {active} active services across the current tenant.
Dashboard.revenueActivityDescription: A compact operating view of invoice momentum and workspace activity across the last six months.
Dashboard.clientModuleDescription: Create client records, manage contacts and addresses, and review client activity logs inside the current tenant workspace.
Dashboard.catalogModuleDescription: Organize product groups, manage hosting plans, define configurable options, and maintain billing-cycle pricing inside the current tenant workspace.
Dashboard.ordersModuleDescription: Create draft orders, review checkout totals, place orders into the tenant workflow, and inspect order details without generating invoices yet.
Dashboard.billingModuleDescription: Create invoices, review billing balances, record offline payments, and launch Stripe or PayPal invoice collection flows with webhook-confirmed payment status updates.
Dashboard.supportModuleDescription: Track support queues, review ticket threads, add admin replies or internal notes, and monitor department workload inside the current tenant workspace.
Dashboard.provisioningModuleDescription: Track tenant hosting services, dispatch placeholder lifecycle operations through the queue, and monitor provisioning job status without concrete panel APIs yet.
Dashboard.openTicketsDescription: Tickets still waiting for staff progress or closure.
Dashboard.overdueInvoicesDescription: Billing records that have passed their due date.
Dashboard.urgentTicketsDescription: Support threads marked with the highest priority.
Dashboard.failedJobsDescription: Provisioning jobs that currently require retry or investigation.
Dashboard.settingsDescription: A dedicated workspace area for tenant preferences, branding, and future operational controls without changing the backend module boundaries.
Dashboard.settingsPlaceholderDescription: This page reserves the settings destination in the admin navigation so tenant configuration, billing defaults, and infrastructure preferences can land in one consistent workspace.
Dashboard.licenseBillingDescription: Manage SaaS licensing plans, tenant billing posture, and platform revenue monitoring from a single owner surface.
Dashboard.licenseBillingBody: Use plans and pricing to define your license offerings, then manage tenants and their issued licenses from the tenant workspace. Payments are collected per your configured gateways.
Dashboard.licenseBillingOpsPlansValue: Edit plan features, limits, and pricing from the catalog.
Dashboard.licenseBillingOpsTenantsValue: Review each tenant license status and expiration.
Dashboard.licenseBillingOpsPaymentsValue: Connect gateways and track license collections.
Dashboard.plansDescription: Edit the SaaS licensing plans that appear on the public pricing page.
Dashboard.plansEditorDescription: Update plan limits, pricing, and trial duration for the public catalog.
Dashboard.plansNotePlaceholder: Short note shown above the pricing grid.

Tenants.pageDescription: Manage hosting-company tenants, their owners, lifecycle status, and licensing summary from the platform owner workspace.
